quiz.question: Which conclusion is best supported by the three sources in this case?
options: Indigenous peoples all shared exactly the same culture.
Cultures are diverse, connected to Country, and preserved via storytelling.
Culture is only important because it belongs to the distant past.

quiz.question: Which conclusion is best supported by the three sources in this case?
options: Trade was rare and mostly accidental.
Trade networks were complex, long-distance, and international.
Only European settlement created meaningful trade.

quiz.question: Which conclusion is best supported by the three sources in this case?
options: Culture was not strongly shaped by the sea.
A distinct culture developed connected to navigation, ceremony, and the sea.
History can be understood only through one symbol.
